This is an example of a Faded Parsons Problem where some pre-text and post-text is given as context before and after the main problem. Those lines of code cannot be re-arranged. Note that only the one-tray format supports pre-text and post-text blocks. class ListHelpers: @staticmethod def total(nums: list): #0given running_total = 0 for number in nums: running_total += number return running_total print(ListHelpers.total([1,2,3])) # for example
